task:
Shotcut is already open with /home/user/Documents/uhd_project.mlt (currently a 1920x1080 30 fps project). A source video exists at /home/user/Videos/drone.mp4.

Switch the project's active video mode to a custom 3840x2160 profile at 30 fps, 16:9 aspect ratio, progressive scan. Place drone.mp4 onto the V1 timeline track as the only clip, and save the project. /home/user/Documents/uhd_project.mlt must end up with a 3840x2160 / 30 fps profile and reference drone.mp4.

verification.description: drone.mp4 is referenced in the project
